tasks.instruction: Add the cheapest bouquet of 12 red roses priced under $60, in the standard 12-stem size, to your cart.

tasks.instruction: From the Mother's Day category, add three different medium-sized bouquets—one featuring roses, one lilies, and one tulips—each priced under $50 so their combined subtotal stays under $150, then go to your cart.

tasks.instruction: From the Birthday category, add one bouquet eligible for same-day delivery to ZIP 10001, priced at $80 or less, selecting today’s date and the earliest available same-day delivery time slot, then add it to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Choose any Get Well bouquet priced under $90, add a glass vase add-on, include the provided gift message, set delivery to ZIP 60601 for May 15, and add one bouquet to your cart.
